data.name: Astro Femdom
data.detailed_description:
Astro Femdom is a first-person 3D sci-fi BDSM experience available on PC and VR, plunging players into a world ruled by commanding Astro Mistresses—superior alien women who capture human males to serve as obedient slaves, toys, and subjects for their desires and experiments.

The game focuses on such femdom action:

• Slave Training: Follow strict protocols, repeat oaths of servitude, and adapt to a life of total obedience.

• Boot & Shoe Worship: Polish and adore your Mistress’s footwear with your tongue to earn approval.

• Spanking & Discipline: Endure spanking to build discipline and strengthen submission.

• Strap-On Domination: Experience strap-on training designed to enforce submission.

• Mild Electric Stimulation: Experience controlled sensory play via restraint devices as punishment.

And more...

Surrender completely in this sci-fi femdom fantasy!

data.short_description: Become slave to superior Astro Mistresses: worship boots, endure strap-on, spanking, slave training, electric discipline, and much more. PC/VR sci-fi BDSM adventure. 18+.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 / AMD Ryzen 5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960 / AMD Radeon RX 480
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR or Oculus PC
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 / AMD Ryzen 7
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 / AMD Radeon RX 7000
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR or Oculus PC
